title: Vulkan X PvP
description: Clean PvP experience with Vulkan powered performance
body:
Vulkan X PvP is a high-performance Minecraft modpack built for smooth, fast, and competitive gameplay. It uses Vulkan rendering and deep performance optimizations to deliver higher FPS, reduced input lag, and stable multiplayer performance.

Designed for PvP players and SMP grinders, this pack focuses on clean visuals, clear combat HUD, low-fire view, zoom, replay support, and smart rendering tweaks for better fights and smoother movement. Every feature is chosen for speed, clarity, and competitive edge.

⚡ Vulkan powered performance
🎯 Built for PvP & SMP
🛡️ Clean visuals, smooth combat, low latency
🖥️ Optimized for low-end to mid-range PCs

All credit for this modpack goes to **Battlezent**.
Note: modpack logo is inspired by FPS Modpack but its not completely copied.
